title: Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me
why_this_song: Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me by Elton John (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: But losing everything is like the sun going down on me
I can't find, oh, the right romantic line
I can't light no more of your darkness
All my pictures seem to fade to black and white
I'm growing tired and time stands still before me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "life" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "life" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I can't light no more of your darkness
Too late to save myself from falling
I can't find, oh, the right romantic line

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" was released in 1974. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Don't Let the Sun Go Down on Me" foi lançada em 1974. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
